attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.ACTIVITY_ITEM_TYPE, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.ACTIVITY_NAME, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.CUSTOM_LEVEL, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.DEFAULT_RESULT, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.ICON_GEOMETRY, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.INSTANCE_ID, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.INSTANCE_LABEL, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PERFORM_ROLE, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PERFORM_ROLE_TYPE, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PROCESS_ITEM_TYPE, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PROCESS_NAME, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PROCESS_VERSION, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PROTECT_LEVEL, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.START_END, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.USER_COMMENT, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES,
 (
 select INSTANCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES
 minus
 select INSTANCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INSTANCE_ID = STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.INSTANCE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WF_PROCESS_ACTIVITIES)
